en: So Israel took his journey with all that he had and came to Beersheba, and offered sacrifices to the God of his father Isaac.
zh: 以色列帶著他所有的一切起程，到了別是巴，就向他父親以撒的 神獻祭。

en: And God spoke to Israel in visions of the night and said, "Jacob, Jacob." And he said, "Here am I."
zh: 神在夜間的異象中對以色列說：“雅各，雅各。”雅各說：“我在這裡。”

en: Then he said, "I am God, the God of your father. Do not be afraid to go down to Egypt, for there I will make you into a great nation.
zh: 神說：“我是 神，就是你父親的 神；你不要怕下埃及去，因為我必使你在那裡成為大國。

en: I myself will go down with you to Egypt, and I will also bring you up again, and Joseph's hand shall close your eyes."
zh: 我要親自與你一同下到埃及去，也必把你帶上來。約瑟要親手合上你的眼給你送終。”

en: Then Jacob set out from Beersheba. The sons of Israel carried Jacob their father, their little ones, and their wives, in the wagons that Pharaoh had sent to carry him.
zh: 雅各就從別是巴起程。以色列的眾子，用法老為雅各送來的車輛，接載他們的父親雅各，以及他們的孩子和妻子。

en: They also took their livestock and their goods, which they had gained in the land of Canaan, and came into Egypt, Jacob and all his offspring with him,
zh: 他們又帶著牲畜，和他們在迦南地所得的財物，來到埃及。這樣，雅各和他所有的子孫，都一同來了。

en: his sons, and his sons' sons with him, his daughters, and his sons' daughters. All his offspring he brought with him into Egypt.
zh: 雅各把他的眾兒子、孫子、女兒、孫女和他所有的後裔，都一同帶到埃及去了。

en: Now these are the names of the descendants of Israel, who came into Egypt, Jacob and his sons. Reuben, Jacob's firstborn,
zh: 來到埃及的以色列人，就是雅各和他的子孫，名單記在下面：雅各的長子是流本。

en: and the sons of Reuben: Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.
zh: 流本的兒子是哈諾、法路、希斯崙和迦米。

en: The sons of Simeon: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jachin, Zohar, and Shaul, the son of a Canaanite woman.
zh: 西緬的兒子是耶母利、雅憫、阿轄、雅斤、瑣轄和迦南女子所生的掃羅。

en: The sons of Levi: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.
zh: 利未的兒子是革順、哥轄和米拉利。

en: The sons of Judah: Er, Onan, Shelah, Perez, and Zerah (but Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan); and the sons of Perez were Hezron and Hamul.
zh: 猶大的兒子是珥、俄南、示拉、法勒斯和謝拉，但是珥和俄南都在迦南地死了。法勒斯的兒子是希斯倫和哈母勒。

en: The sons of Issachar: Tola, Puvah, Yob, and Shimron.
zh: 以薩迦的兒子是陀拉、普瓦、雅述 和伸崙。

en: The sons of Zebulun: Sered, Elon, and Jahleel.
zh: 西布倫的兒子是西烈、以倫和雅利。

en: These are the sons of Leah, whom she bore to Jacob in Paddan-aram, together with his daughter Dinah; altogether his sons and his daughters numbered thirty-three.
zh: 以上這些人是利亞在巴旦．亞蘭給雅各生的兒子，另外還有女兒底拿。這些子孫一共三十三人。

en: The sons of Gad: Ziphion, Haggi, Shuni, Ezbon, Eri, Arodi, and Areli.
zh: 迦得的兒子是洗非芸、哈基、書尼、以斯本、以利、亞羅底和亞列利。

en: The sons of Asher: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, with Serah their sister. And the sons of Beriah: Heber and Malchiel.
zh: 亞設的兒子是音拿、亦施瓦、亦施韋和比利亞，還有他們的姊妹西拉。比利亞的兒子是希別和瑪結。

en: These are the sons of Zilpah, whom Laban gave to Leah his daughter; and these she bore to Jacob- sixteen persons.
zh: 以上這些人是拉班給女兒利亞作婢女的悉帕給雅各生的子孫，一共十六人。

en: The sons of Rachel, Jacob's wife: Joseph and Benjamin.
zh: 雅各的妻子拉結，生了約瑟和便雅憫。

en: And to Joseph in the land of Egypt were born Manasseh and Ephraim, whom Asenath, the daughter of Potiphera the priest of On, bore to him.
zh: 約瑟在埃及地生了瑪拿西和以法蓮，就是安城的祭司波提非拉的女兒亞西納給約瑟生的。

en: And the sons of Benjamin: Bela, Becher, Ashbel, Gera, Naaman, Ehi, Rosh, Muppim, Huppim, and Ard.
zh: 便雅憫的兒子是比拉、比結、亞實別、基拉、乃幔、以希、羅實、母平、戶平和亞勒。

en: These are the sons of Rachel, who were born to Jacob- fourteen persons in all.
zh: 以上這些人是拉結給雅各生的子孫，一共十四人。

en: The sons of Dan: Hushim.
zh: 但的兒子是戶伸。

en: The sons of Naphtali: Jahzeel, Guni, Jezer, and Shillem.
zh: 拿弗他利的兒子是雅薛、沽尼、耶色和示冷。

en: These are the sons of Bilhah, whom Laban gave to Rachel his daughter, and these she bore to Jacob- seven persons in all.
zh: 以上這些人是拉班給女兒拉結作婢女的辟拉給雅各生的子孫，一共七人。

en: All the persons belonging to Jacob who came into Egypt, who were his own descendants, not including Jacob's sons' wives, were sixty-six persons in all.
zh: 所有從雅各所生、與雅各一同來到埃及的人，除了他的兒婦之外，一共六十六人。

en: And the sons of Joseph, who were born to him in Egypt, were two. All the persons of the house of Jacob who came into Egypt were seventy.
zh: 另外還有約瑟在埃及所生的兩個兒子。雅各家來到埃及的所有成員，一共七十人。

en: He had sent Judah ahead of him to Joseph to show the way before him in Goshen, and they came into the land of Goshen.
zh: 雅各派猶大先到約瑟那裡去，請約瑟指教他去歌珊的路。於是他們來到歌珊地。

en: Then Joseph prepared his chariot and went up to meet Israel his father in Goshen. He presented himself to him and fell on his neck and wept on his neck a good while.
zh: 約瑟預備了車，上去歌珊迎接他的父親以色列。約瑟一看見他，就伏在他的頸項上，在他的頸項上哭了很久。

en: Israel said to Joseph, "Now let me die, since I have seen your face and know that you are still alive."
zh: 以色列對約瑟說：“這一次我看見了你的面，知道你還在，我死了也甘心。”

en: Joseph said to his brothers and to his father's household, "I will go up and tell Pharaoh and will say to him, 'My brothers and my father's household, who were in the land of Canaan, have come to me.
zh: 約瑟對他的兄弟們和他的父家說：“我要上去告訴法老，對他說：‘我在迦南地的兄弟們和我的父家，都到我這裡來了。

en: And the men are shepherds, for they have been keepers of livestock, and they have brought their flocks and their herds and all that they have.'
zh: 這些人都是牧羊人，以牧養牲畜為生。他們把自己的牛羊和一切所有的，都帶來了。’

en: When Pharaoh calls you and says, 'What is your occupation?'
zh: 法老召見你們的時候，如果問你們：‘你們是作甚麼的？’

en: you shall say, 'Your servants have been keepers of livestock from our youth even until now, both we and our fathers,' in order that you may dwell in the land of Goshen, for every shepherd is an abomination to the Egyptians."
zh: 你們就要回答：‘僕人們從幼年直到現在，都是以牧養牲畜為生。我們和我們的祖先都是一樣。’這樣，你們就可以住在歌珊地，因為埃及人厭惡所有牧羊的人。”
